channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DMR] DMR Engineering Appoints Mittal & Bhat as Executive Directors
item.description:
DMR Engineering Ltd's board meeting on May 09, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Divay Mittal and Mr. Arvind Bhat as Executive Directors for terms of 5 and 2 years respectively, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Nakul Yadav was appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27 and FY28. Mr. Krishan Kumar Gupta retired as Non-executive Director, with the board not recommending his reappointment.

  • Divay Mittal appointed as Executive Director for 5 years, effective May 09, 2026.
  • Arvind Bhat appointed as Executive Director for 2 years, effective May 09, 2026.
  • Nakul Yadav appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27 and FY28.
  • Krishan Kumar Gupta retired as Non-executive Director on May 09, 2026.
  • Board meeting commenced at 02.00 p.m. (IST) and concluded at 03.00 p.m. (IST).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DMR Hydroengineering & Infrastructures Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MAYURUNIQ] Mayur Uniquoters: Dhodsar Plant Partially Affected by Strike
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mayur Uniquoters Ltd's Dhodsar manufacturing plant is partially affected due to a strike by contractual workers, impacting one coating line from May 9, 2026. Other plants are fully operational. The company is in discussions to resolve the issue. The estimated production loss is around 15,000 linear meters per day. The company states wages have been increased as per industry standards, but some workers are asking for more. All assets are covered by insurance.

  • Strike by contractual workers partially affects Mayur Uniquoters' Dhodsar plant.
  • One coating line is impacted, with an estimated loss of 15,000 linear meters per day.
  • Other manufacturing plants of the company are fully operational.
  • Company is in discussions to resolve the strike amicably.
  • All assets are covered by insurance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAYUR UNIQUOTERS LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RCOM] Reliance Communications: CBI Search at Ex-Director's Residence
item.description:
On May 9, 2026, the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) conducted a search and seizure operation at the residence of Smt. Grace Thomas, a Non Executive and Non Independent Director of Reliance Communications Limited (RCOM) and erstwhile director of Reliance Telecom Limited (RTL). The search was carried out under the provisions of Section 105 / 185 of the Bhartiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023, related to alleged violations under the IPC and PC Act. RCOM states that the operation is not expected to impact its financials or operations, as it is undergoing corporate insolvency resolution process under the IBC.

  • CBI conducted a search at the residence of former Reliance Telecom director, Grace Thomas.
  • The search relates to alleged violations under the Bhartiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, IPC, and PC Act.
  • Officials seized personal details and financial records related to Reliance companies.
  • RCOM states the CBI action is not expected to impact its financials or operations.
  • RCOM is currently undergoing corporate insolvency resolution under the IBC.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE COMMUNICATIONS LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [STALLION] Stallion India Fluorochemicals Board Meeting on 13 May 2026
item.description:
Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve the Annual Audited Financial Statements for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Auditors' Reports.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026.
  • Consideration and approval of annual audited financial statements.
  • Review of Auditors' Reports for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NIACL] New India Assurance cancels Q4 FY26 earnings call
item.description:
The New India Assurance Company Ltd has cancelled its analyst/institutional investors’ conference call, previously scheduled for May 12, 2026, at 02:30 p.m. IST, to discuss the financial performance for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 (Q4 FY26). The cancellation is due to unavoidable circumstances. A revised schedule for the investor meeting will be communicated to the exchanges in due course. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 and 46 (2) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • New India Assurance cancels Q4 FY26 earnings conference call.
  • Original call was scheduled for May 12, 2026, at 02:30 p.m. IST.
  • Cancellation due to unavoidable circumstances.
  • Revised schedule for investor meeting to be communicated later.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: The New India Assurance Company Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MFSL] Max Financial Cancels Q4 FY26 Earnings Call
item.description:
Max Financial Services Ltd has announced the cancellation of its Q4 FY26 earnings call, previously scheduled for May 13, 2026. The company reaffirms its commitment to transparent communication and will continue to adhere to disclosure processes for investor and analyst engagement.

  • Max Financial cancels Q4 FY26 earnings call.
  • The call was initially scheduled for May 13, 2026.
  • Company commits to transparent communication.
  • Future investor engagement will follow due disclosure processes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Max Financial Services Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HYPERSOFT] Hypersoft Technologies Board Meeting on 13 May 2026
item.description:
Hypersoft Technologies Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window will open 48 hours after the declaration of results, effective from May 16, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated results for Q4 and FY26 will be considered.
  • Trading window to open on May 16, 2026, post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hypersoft Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DBOL] Dhampur Bio Organics: Chairman Vijay Kumar Goel Passes Away
item.description:
Dhampur Bio Organics Ltd. announced the death of its Chairman and Executive Director, Shri Vijay Kumar Goel, on May 10, 2026. The company acknowledged his contributions and legacy in an exchange filing under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Shri Vijay Kumar Goel, Chairman and Executive Director, passed away on May 10, 2026.
  • The company mourns the loss and recognizes his contributions.
  • DIN of deceased director is 00075317.
  • The announcement was made under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dhampur Bio Organics Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PYRAMID] Pyramid Technoplast Board Meeting on May 13, 2026
item.description:
Pyramid Technoplast Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares will remain closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Audited results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours post result declaration.
  • Meeting will be held at the company's registered office.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pyramid Technoplast Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IFGLEXPOR] IFGL Refractories: K Selva Muthu Kumar Resigns as VP
item.description:
Mr. K Selva Muthu Kumar has resigned from his position as Vice President (Vizag Works) of IFGL Refractories Ltd due to personal reasons, effective from the close of business hours on May 9, 2026. His resignation has been accepted by the company. In his place, Mr. C Natarajan has been appointed as the new Vice President (Vizag Works), effective from May 10, 2026. Mr. Natarajan holds a Bachelor’s degree in Ceramic Technology and has 28 years of experience in the Refractory industry.

  • K Selva Muthu Kumar resigned as Vice President (Vizag Works) due to personal reasons.
  • Resignation is effective from close of business hours on May 9, 2026.
  • C Natarajan appointed as Vice President (Vizag Works) effective May 10, 2026.
  • C Natarajan has 28 years of experience in the Refractory industry.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IFGL Refractories Ltd | Category: Management Change
